positive: A whimsical, vibrant illustration of floating islands populated by giant, friendly cartoon animals (bears, sloths, otters). The style should be flat design, highly saturated colors, mid-century modern illustration, storybook quality, perfect for children's merchandise.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grunge, realism, deep shadows
